zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Orrell於1386年出生在英國越可爾斯亞頓時，她的父親Nicholas Orrell35歲，母親Ellen de Stanley36歲。她和James Strangways I至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1420年在英國越可爾享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Orrell于1386年出生在英国越可爾斯亞頓时，她的父亲Nicholas Orrell35岁，母亲Ellen de Stanley36岁。她和James Strangways I至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1420年在英国越可爾享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Orrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from either of two minor places in Lancashire called Orell. The placename derives from Old English ōra ‘bank, slope, hill, edge’ or ōra ‘ore’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Orrill
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire and Leicestershire): variant of   Orrell  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Orrell was born in 1386, in Sneaton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Nicholas Orrell, was 35 and her mother, Ellen de Stanley, was 36. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with James Strangways I. She died in 1420, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Orrell est née en 1386, à Sneaton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Orrell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ellen de Stanley, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec James Strangways I. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Orrell 1386 in Sneaton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Orrell 35 und ihre Mutter Ellen de Stanley 36. Sie hatte mit James Strangways I mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Orrell è nata il nel 1386 nel Sneaton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Nicholas Orrell, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Ellen de Stanley, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con James Strangways I. Morì nel 1420, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Orrell(이)가 1386년 영국 요르크실르 스니앳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Orrell(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen de Stanley(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 James Strangways I(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 요르크실르에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Orrell nasceu em 1386, em Sneaton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Orrell, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ellen de Stanley, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com James Strangways I. Ela faleceu em 1420, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Orrell родилась в 1386 г. в местности снитон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Orrell было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen de Stanley, 36. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от James Strangways I. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.
